MeasurementToolMetadata.Instructions: The following questions relate to your usual sleep habits during the past month only.
MeasurementToolMetadata.LongName: Self-report sleep quality over the past month. Seven component scores (each 0-3) sum to a global score (0-21). Free-text *_text columns are legacy non-coded versions of the time/duration items; psqi_10* are bed-partner-reported items and are not part of the score.

psqi_1.Description: During the past month, what time have you usually gone to bed at night? Stored as a 4-digit HHMM clock-time code (24-hour).

psqi_1_text.Description: During the past month, what time have you usually gone to bed at night?BED TIME

psqi_2.Description: During the past month, how long (in minutes) has it usually taken you to fall asleep each night?NUMBER OF MINUTES

psqi_2_text.Description: During the past month, how long (in minutes) has it usually taken you to fall asleep each night?NUMBER OF MINUTES

psqi_3.Description: During the past month, what time have you usually gotten up in the morning? Stored as a 4-digit HHMM clock-time code (24-hour).

psqi_3_text.Description: During the past month, what time have

psqi_4.Description: During the past month, how many hours of actual sleep did you get at night? (This may be different than the number of hours you spent in bed.)HOURS OF SLEEP PER NIGHT

psqi_4_text.Description: During the past month, how many hours of actual sleep did you get at night? (This may be different than the number of hours you spent in bed.)HOURS OF SLEEP PER NIGHT

psqi_5a.Description: Cannot get to sleep within 30 minutes

Levels.3: Three or more times a week

psqi_5b.Description: Wake up in the middle of the night or early morning

Levels.3: Three or more times a week

psqi_5c.Description: Have to get up to use the bathroom

Levels.3: Three or more times a week
Three or more times a week
Three or more times a week
Three or more times a week
Three or more times a week
Three or more times a week
Three or more times a week

psqi_5othera.Description: How often during the past month have you had trouble sleeping because of this?Select "Not during the past month" if no other trouble sleeping

Levels.3: Three or more times a week

psqi_6.Description: During the past month, how would you rate your sleep quality overall?

Levels.3: Very bad

psqi_7.Description: During the past month, how often have you taken medicine to help you sleep (prescribed or "over the counter")?

Levels.3: Three or more times a week

psqi_8.Description: During the past month, how often have you had trouble staying awake while driving, eating meals, or engaging in social activity?

Levels.3: Three or more times a week

psqi_9.Description: During the past month, how much of a problem has it been for you to keep up enough enthusiasm to get things done?

Levels.3: A very big problem

psqi_10.Description: Do you have a bed partner or room mate?

Levels.0: No bed partner or room mate
Levels.2: Partner in same room, but not same bed
Levels.3: Partner in same bed
Three or more times a week

psqi_10b.Description: Long pauses between breaths while asleep

Levels.3: Three or more times a week

psqi_10c.Description: Legs twitching or jerking while you sleep

Levels.3: Three or more times a week

psqi_10d.Description: Episodes of disorientation or confusion during sleep

Levels.3: Three or more times a week

psqi_10e.Description: Other restlessness while you sleep; please describe

psqi_10e1.Description: Frequency of the 'other restlessness while you sleep' described in psqi_10e (bed partner / roommate report).

Levels.3: Three or more times a week

psqi_score_component1.Description: Component 1 - Subjective sleep quality: equals psqi_6 (0 Very good to 3 Very bad).

psqi_score_component2.Description: Component 2 - Sleep latency: psqi_2 (minutes to fall asleep) binned 0-3, plus psqi_5a (0-3); the sum is re-binned (0 / 1-2 / 3-4 / 5-6) to 0-3.

psqi_score_component3.Description: Component 3 - Sleep duration: from psqi_4 (hours slept): >7h=0, 6-7h=1, 4-5h=2, <5h=3.

psqi_score_component4.Description: Component 4 - Habitual sleep efficiency: (hours slept psqi_4 / hours in bed [bedtime psqi_1 to rise time psqi_3]) x 100, binned >85%=0, 75-84%=1, 65-74%=2, <65%=3. Manually set to n/a for sub-110354 (implausible reported times).

psqi_score_component5.Description: Component 5 - Sleep disturbances: sum of psqi_5b-psqi_5i and psqi_5othera, binned 0=0, 1-9=1, 10-18=2, 19-27=3.

psqi_score_component6.Description: Component 6 - Use of sleeping medication: equals psqi_7 (0-3).

psqi_score_component7.Description: Component 7 - Daytime dysfunction: psqi_8 + psqi_9, binned 0=0, 1-2=1, 3-4=2, 5-6=3.

psqi_score_global.Description: Global PSQI score: sum of the 7 component scores (range 0-21). n/a if any component is missing; also n/a for sub-110354 (see component 4).
